resourceTemplates.name: list-anthropic-credentials
resourceTemplates.title: List Anthropic credentials
resourceTemplates.description: List credentials in an Anthropic vault. The secure scraper only returns credentials when the current user owns the parent vault.

resourceTemplates.name: get-anthropic-credential
resourceTemplates.title: Get Anthropic credential
resourceTemplates.description: Retrieve a credential in an Anthropic vault. Sensitive fields are not returned by Anthropic, and the secure scraper only returns credentials when the current user owns the parent vault.
